channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sports Betting States Where It’s Legal in the US 2026 (Full List)
item.description: Find out where sports betting is legal in all 50 US states in 2026. See online availability, launch dates, college restrictions, and licensed sportsbo...

item.title: What Will It Take For USA To Win 2026 World Cup? 'High Capability Of Suffering'
item.description: The former coaches of the United States men's national team map out the path to success at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft Odds: Top-10 Mock Using Betting Markets
item.description: NFL Draft betting odds are shaping the top 10. Here’s how the board could fall if each team selects the current favorite at their respective pick.

item.title: Chelsea Sacks Manager Liam Rosenior After Less Than 4 Months
item.description: Liam Rosenior has been fired as Chelsea manager after less than four months in the job and four days before the club plays in an FA Cup semifinal at W...

item.title: 2026 NASCAR Odds: Joey Logano, Ryan Blaney Early Favorites for Talladega
item.description: Can Tyler Reddick add a sixth win to his 2026 tally when Cup goes to Talladega? Here are the early odds.

item.title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Can the Penguins turn the tide in Philly?
item.description: Here's a preview of Wednesday's three games, along with stat leaders and a look back on Tuesday's OT-filled evening.

item.title: Sources: NFL prospect Banks eyes June clearance
item.description: Florida's Caleb Banks, one of the top defensive tackles in this year's draft, is expected to be fully cleared for football activities in early June af...

item.title: Fever's Clark to stay fresh by handling ball less
item.description: Fever star Caitlin Clark is prepared to give up a bit of control heading into the season by playing off the ball for stretches in order to give her a ...

item.title: Cowboys won't talk long-term deal with Pickens
item.description: The Cowboys will not discuss a long-term contract with George Pickens and want him to play this season on the franchise tag, executive Stephen Jones s...

item.title: Five reasons to still trust the Pistons, even after a disastrous Game 1
item.description: Game 1 didn't go Detroit's way on Sunday, but there are still a lot of reasons to trust these young Pistons.
